candidate.completion: text me back before I start giving my houseplants your personality.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please text me back before I start giving my houseplants your personality.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and specific: loneliness becomes projection, and "your personality" lands as the pivot. The image feels fresh and humanly recognizable, but the sentence spends a few extra words to get there and is more clever than fully compressed or aphoristic.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
